news:news.news:title: Rescue efforts in Iran for a US crew member face significant challenges, while Hungary prepares for a pivotal election against Viktor Orban's long-standing leadership.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran rescue operations, Hungary elections 2026, Cuba prisoner release, Burkina Faso military leadership, France Muslim gathering court ruling

news:news.news:title: The US jobs market showed positive growth in March, but concerns remain over the impact of rising oil prices and corporate fee increases.
news:news.news:keywords: US jobs market performance, impact of oil prices on economy, corporate fee increases and consumer backlash, private credit market confidence, Trump's tariffs on pharmaceuticals

news:news.news:title: Anthropic's new policy significantly increases costs for users of OpenClaw with Claude AI, while other tech developments include NASA fixing an Outlook glitch and OpenAI's CEO taking medical leave.
news:news.news:keywords: AI subscription cost changes, NASA technical issues, OpenAI leadership changes, gaming hardware price increases, Apple Watch health technology impact

news:news.news:title: Geno Auriemma criticized officiating after UConn's loss, while UCLA reached its first NCAA title game and Cooper Flagg became the youngest player with a 50-point NBA game.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA Women's Basketball Final Four, NBA Rookie Records, Giannis Antetokounmpo Health Investigation, Luka Doncic Injury Update, WNBA Expansion Draft Highlights

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific advancements include a gene therapy for deafness, insights into aging and immune response, and a new microwave technique for healthier fries.
news:news.news:keywords: gene therapy for hearing restoration, impact of aging on immune response, ancient life discoveries, healthier cooking techniques, space exploration advancements

news:news.news:title: The ongoing war in Iran is causing significant economic distress and impacting global supply chains, while political tensions in the US and Europe continue to rise.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran war humanitarian crisis, Trump political changes, Brazil pet custody law, Greece weather impact, US-Israel relations

news:news.news:title: Oil prices surged following Trump's warning to Iran, while Blue Owl Capital limited withdrawals amid investor concerns over the unregulated lending market.
news:news.news:keywords: impact of geopolitical tensions on oil prices, corporate layoffs in tech sector, pharmaceutical industry tariffs, investor confidence in lending markets, construction worker health issues

news:news.news:title: Archive of Our Own exits beta after 17 years, while Granola app raises privacy concerns over note-sharing settings.
news:news.news:keywords: privacy concerns in technology, updates on popular tech platforms, new product innovations in gadgets

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods faces DUI charges following a crash, while Luka Doncic's injury raises concerns for the NBA playoffs.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods DUI arrest details, Luka Doncic injury update, Phil Mickelson Masters withdrawal, Stephon Gilmore retirement announcement, Women's NCAA Final Four predictions

news:news.news:title: NASA's Artemis II mission marks the first crewed Moon flyby in over 50 years, alongside significant discoveries in health, archaeology, and environmental science.
news:news.news:keywords: NASA Artemis II mission details, health benefits of new frying technique, ancient gambling practices in America, microbial fingerprints in colorectal cancer, new species discoveries in South America

news:news.news:title: Cuba Frees 2,000 Prisoners Under US Pressure as Burkina Faso Military Rejects Democracy
Oil Prices Spike Amid Trump’s Warning on Iran; Blue Owl Capital Limits Withdrawals
